items.raw_desc: Kapcsoló relé TP-Link Tapo S110E Smart Switch Module:The TP-Link Tapo S110E smart switching module turns your ordinary devices into a smart home without the need for complicated installation changes. With dry and wet contact support, you can control your garage door, boiler, irrigation, underfloor heating and lights locally and remotely via the Tapo app. The TP-Link Tapo S110E supports the Matter standard, making it easy to integrate with Apple Home, Google Home, Alexa or Samsung SmartThings.
